author: lilolivesauce
title: amazing and convenient app !!
content: i was too lazy to do all my metadata editing for my local spotify files on my computer so i was just testing some apps to see if anything would work for iphone, and this app works great!! the only “issue” that doesn’t seem to work is the synced lyrics option, but 1. i could very well be doing it wrong lol, and 2. i wasn’t even looking for something like that, so the fact that they had that much customization is definitely a plus!! but overall this app has worked great for me and i love it!! :D

author: Luvthewavves
title: Amazing but it has a major flaw
content: For some reason when I save my mp3 tags, it doesn’t actually save. So I have to do the process 3 times or so because when I download the file, it was pre-tag. The app says I saved my mp3 tags but it doesn’t and it’s frustrating to keep trying for 10 minutes just to upload a tagged file.

content: Somewhat helping with Spotify local file covers

author: JDought1
title: Awesome

author: jodanlol
title: Love this app.. couple missing features. flac art support / animation/animated art would be awesome
content:
as I said. Incredible mobile app to batch edit metadata. I wish it had better support for flac. 

sometimes when I try to get rid of a flac files image art and save it. it resets it to the original metadata art. (art only)

would be nice if it actually got rid of the art. 

again great app

author: isabellalovestoes99
title: love love love
content: best app ever for uploading local files to spotify with custom album covers C:

author: Proddjz
title: Accessibility
content:
Hi there. I am a blind person and I use this app all the time. However there is an issue where anytime I turn VoiceOver on or off on my iPhone it immediately completely restarts the app back to the very first screen if you guys could fix this issue that would be amazing. Otherwise, this app is perfect. It lets me do everything I want with any MP3’s.
Thank you.

author: Cap can’t apple
title: Worst metadata/tag editor of all time.
content:
DO NOT USE THIS. USE LITERALLY ANYTHING ELSE.

It’s legitimately unbelievable how many ads they cram into a software that does something that can be done on any other device by just selecting the file and hitting edit. 

If IOS wasn’t so ridiculous with how outdated their file management software was, this app wouldn’t even need to exist in the first place.

On top of that, they edit in their own metadata comment upon saving the file that credits their app. Even though, again, the app didn’t do anything special that couldn’t be done on any other device for free as PART of the devices most BASIC FUNCTIONS. 

Lastly, the amount of data this app tracks is INSANE for what this software does.

I reiterate, do not use this app. It’s a scam.

author: MessiahAbel
title: Really good app
content: Great app, easy on storage space, but the latest update as of mid November 2025, there is a bug where “Explicit” markers aren’t being applied and are removed after saving the file, even if that field wasn’t edited. Kinda annoying.

author: Itsrslr_
title: Google Drive connection missing
content:
I am using Evermusic Pro from past 5 years and it is awesome product and it allows me to connect to Google Drive. Somehow I am not able to see Google Drive connection in evertag. It is same interface not sure what is wrong. 
Reached developer for clarification. It is more than a week and no response yet.

author: polishjedi
title: Good app but some an issue
content: Why does Evermusic support Google Drive connections but this app doesn't? I have all of my local files stored there and use them to stream on Evermusic but I can't edit incorrect tags on there. I end up having to delete them off Drive and reupload them with the correct tags which is annoying. Other than this issue, the app is good, I just don't like the automatic comment that is added when you edit a file.

author: Carthagtuek
title: Tags Disappear After Saving
content: I don’t know how many times I had to re-enter the same tags because they disappear after saving. Can’t enter Language, Initial Key, Performer because they are gone. Under the musicians category, it always adds an extra entry that I repeatedly have to erase. Maybe they do these things so you will pay for a subscription. Glad I didn’t.

author: Reipert Benson S600
title: Mobile only scrub
content: Perfect app for me where I do everything on my phone. I don’t have to sign up to use it- thanks you! The only ads I get happen when I edit artwork but easy to click through.  I just add a . if I don’t want the comment field to say “edited with Evertag”. Thank you devs for the help with cleaning up my archive.org downloads ;) Thanks ChatGPT for the recommendation. You know it’s decent when I, a real human bean, actually cared enough to come here and write a review.

author: lee the guy
title: LIFESAVER if you don’t have a computer
content: I download a lottttt of FLAC files from Bandcamp and other services to play on my phone. It’s hard to find services to edit FLAC tags to your liking if you don’t own a computer, so this app feels like an absolute gem. It’s quick, easy, and there’s not really a catch to it. Thank you so much for this app!

content: It was a decent tag editor until the latest update filled it with ads—now it’s barely usable.

author: Pyrixur
title: I love this app, but..
content: I honestly think this is the best file editing app on apple but I don’t like the fact that you can’t deactivate the image scaling and is forced upon you to have a wonky image, hope that can be fixed, great app though thank you.

author: ratutat
title: Excellent mp3 metadata editing tool for iOS foobar2000
content: This has been my go to app for the mp3 files that end up with different metadata written to certain mp3 tracks off the same album. When this happens foobar2000 takes the tracks with contradicting metadata and presents them as separate albums in your library which is super annoying to look at. This tool has the ability to edit the metadata of each track individually or I could upload the entire album and do a batch edit all at once..though for some of the more complicated difference’s I still had to go back and edit each one individually. It gets the job done though. I recommend this app.

content: Everything is great about this app, but whenever you mark the audio file as explicit, it doesn’t show up in the actual music app (Spotify)

title: You can’t change album art anymore
content: I need to turn auto update off. Updates in 2024 ruin everything

author: Marty $&@
title: Finally an App for this, but..
content:
Okay first off thank you for someone making an app for this. My hope is this app gains a lot more options for interface settings and tagging ability. I’d write my feedback but the app says I don’t have an email client setup which if it means Apple email that’s true. Things I would like to see 
01. Make the cover art preview for each file bigger, like the wide of the screen bigger.
02. Make tagging for folders as well as files.
03. Add bulk tagging from the root of a folder, what I mean by this is say I’m in the artist folder and have 4 albums but the artist name isn’t correct I want to be able to correct it for all files within this folder.

author: DexterTheWulf
title: I can’t thank you enough
content:
I originally tried to go online and do this, but the glitch made it only upload image files only, so I went to the App Store and found this.
At first I was confused on how to do this, but now EVERYTHING makes sense. It literally just edits the file on your phone. No waiting for uploading and downloading, just *snap*, the file's been tagged. Huge dub. 5⭐️.

author: anothersideanotherlexi
title: Useful but buggy
content:
This app is buggy. It seems to have a hard time keeping track of which song it is actually viewing/editing and will display the wrong info at times. While I was trying to edit a song’s title, the app overwrote the entire metadata of one song with another song’s data. I ended up re-downloading the song in question because of it.

It would be extremely helpful to have a spreadsheet-style view, so that I could look at the fields I’m most concerned with on all my songs at a glance. I intend to do some heavy organizing using metadata but that’s a lot harder if I have to check each song one by one. Filtering would be huge for this as well.

author: PkMcBee
title: Does not recognize iTunes app downloaded music
content:
When I downloaded my music from my pc using the iTunes app, some of the tags and almost all of the covers did not make it. Foolishly, I purchased this app without testing it. This app cannot find the music stored on my iPhone that is stored within the music app. Obviously a bad assumption by me, I am unsure why this is the case when apps such as the N7 player can find and access those music files.

FAQ’s appears to reference a tab and options that do not appear in this version of the app.

author: NushBush24
title: Keeps Crashing
content: I don’t know if it’s a bug, but it was working perfectly for me but when I get all the way to the bottom to edit a tag it keeps crashing. Other than that it works fine and as intended. When you get the chance to fix the problem I will give you five stars.
